curation_notes: Location derived from the patch diff which modifies the escape_dict function in pymysql/converters.py. The function escaped dictionary values but not keys, enabling SQL injection via untrusted JSON input. Only one non-test source file was changed (converters.py). No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern. Pre-assigned class sql-injection (CWE-89) confirmed correct by both the advisory description and the patch diff.
